steps: Cut frozen muscle sections (5 mm) in a cryostat on microscope slides.
The slides were allowed to reach room temperature.
The slides were permeabilized with 0.3% Triton X-100-PBS for 10 min at 4°C.
A blocking solution of 5% normal goat serum (NGS)-PBS was applied for 1 h at room temperature.
Primary antibodies in 1% NGS-PBS (1:100) were applied at 4°C overnight.
Three consecutive washes with PBS for 5 min each.
Secondary antibodies in 1% NGS-PBS (1:500) were applied for 30 min at room temperature.
creator: Momoko Ogitani
